title: as soon as / the moment / once + S + V

formulas.formula: As soon as / The moment / Once + S + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 一……就……，表示兩個動作緊密相連，前一動作完成立刻引發後一動作

formulas.formula: S + V as soon as / the moment / once + S + V
formulas.zh: 後置型：主要子句在前，時間連接詞子句在後

explanation: 此句型用於表達兩動作的立即先後關係，強調時間上的緊密銜接。三個連接詞中，as soon as最常用且最直接；the moment帶有瞬間性；once則強調第一次發生的條件含義。關鍵點：時間子句必須用現在式表未來，不能用將來式；主要子句可用任何時態。常見錯誤是使用will在時間子句中，或混淆as soon as與when的細微差別（as soon as更強調立即性）。

examples.eng: As soon as you arrive at the airport, please call me.
examples.chi: 你一到達機場，請立刻打電話給我。

examples.eng: The moment the teacher enters the classroom, students stop talking.
examples.chi: 老師一進教室，學生們就停止說話。

examples.eng: Once you finish your homework, you can watch TV for one hour.
examples.chi: 一旦你完成功課，你就可以看一個小時的電視。

examples.eng: She will inform us the moment she receives the test results.
examples.chi: 她一收到考試成績就會告知我們。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵：看是否要表達「一……就……」的立即因果關係。時間子句不可用will，應用現在式。Once強調條件（一旦第一次），而as soon as只強調時間點的接近性。若要表達習慣性反應，用the moment最貼切。

examples.test: ❌ As soon as you will arrive, I will pick you up.
examples.result: → ✓ As soon as you arrive, I will pick you up.（時間子句用現在式，不用will）

examples.test: ❌ Once you finished your work, you can leave.
examples.result: → ✓ Once you finish your work, you can leave.（時間子句須用現在式，非過去式）

examples.test: ✓ The moment I saw her face, I knew she was upset.
examples.result: → 過去式：表過去完成的立即反應，時態保持一致

extension.note: 時間子句永遠用現在式（代未來）或過去式（代過去），絕不用將來式；三詞詞根：as soon as=最快速、once=第一次、the moment=瞬間點。

parts: the airport, send me a text message.
blanks: As soon as you arrive at
exercises.sentence: As soon as you arrive at the airport, send me a text message.
exercises.translation: 你一到達機場，就傳簡訊給我。

exercises.sentence: The moment the concert began, the audience started cheering.
exercises.translation: 音樂會一開始，觀眾就歡呼起來。

parts: you understand this concept, the exam will be easier for you.
exercises.sentence: Once you understand this concept, the exam will be easier for you.
exercises.translation: 一旦你理解了這個概念，考試對你來說就會容易得多。

exercises.sentence: I will let you know the moment I receive the confirmation email.
exercises.translation: 我一收到確認郵件，就會通知你。
